           wavelength     intg_flux      intg_err    gauss_flux     gauss_err         eqw       eqw_err  ion      latex_label               profile_label pixel_mask           w1           w2           w3           w4           w5           w6           w_i           w_f     peak_wave     peak_flux          cont      std_cont        m_cont        n_cont    snr_line  snr_cont    z_line           amp        center      sigma       amp_err     center_err     sigma_err         v_r       v_r_err   sigma_vel  sigma_vel_err  sigma_thermal  sigma_instr   pixel_vel  FWHM_intg      FWHM_g         FWZI  v_med  v_50  v_5  v_10  v_90  v_95       chisqr     redchi         aic         bic observations comments  eqw_gaussian  eqw_gaussian_err
